calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF RIGHTS
Off Calendar Sep-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF ORANGE COUNTY REGISTER COMMUNICATIONS, INC.'S MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF RIGHTS is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
